summary: A Fox News (Hannity) panel segment with Stephen Miller and Kayleigh McEnany reacting to President Biden's joint address to Congress, with Fox chyrons and a split-screen of pundits. This is a recorded cable-news interview/panel, not a produced entertainment piece. Mis-tagged as advertisement; it is plainly a news/TV clip and out of scope.
notable_text: Fox News chyrons: 'KAYLEIGH MCENANY OUTNUMBERED CO-HOST'; 'TIM SCOTT: AMERICA IS NOT A RACIST COUNTRY'; 'DRESSED UP IN BUMPER STICKER SLOGANS AND CLICHES, BIDEN PLAN IS MORE TAXES, MORE DEBT, AND AMNESTY'; HANNITY
